channel.title: Nonlinear Beta Tests Results on Weiguang Liu
channel.description: Recent content in Nonlinear Beta Tests Results on Weiguang Liu

item.title: Individual Stock Return Full Sample
item.description: Individual Stock Return Full Sample Cross Sectional Regression has intercept: 1 Bootstrap Iterations: 1000 Estimating Beta With: 1976-07-30 to 2017-12-29 Estimating Average Excess Return with: 1976-07-30-2017-12-29 Return Dimension TxN: (498, 463) Model Tn Left CV Right CV Is Nonlinear? MktRf 2.14 -1.47 1.78 * HML 2.13 -1.42 1.36 * SMB -0.19 -1.49 1.57 nxf -0.

item.title: Individual Stock Return Sub-sample
item.description: Individual Stock Return Sub-sample Cross Sectional Regression has intercept: 1 Bootstrap Iterations: 1000 Estimating Beta With: 1976-07-30 to 1999-12-31 Estimating Average Excess Return with: 2000-01-31-2017-12-29 Return Dimension TxN: (498, 463) Model Tn Left CV Right CV Is Nonlinear? MktRf -0.9 -1.43 1.41 HML 0.11 -1.39 1.11 SMB 2.17 -1.49 1.66 * nxf 0.65 -1.

item.title: Portfolio 202 adding one factor to Feng et al 4 Factors
item.description: Portfolio 202 adding one factor to Feng et al 4 Factors Cross Sectional Regression has intercept: 1 Bootstrap Iterations: 1000 Estimating Beta With: 1976-07-30 to 2017-12-29 Estimating Average Excess Return with: 1976-07-30-2017-12-29 Return Dimension TxN: (498, 463) Model Tn Left CV Right CV Is Nonlinear? SMB+nxf+chcsho+pm+BAB 2.5 -1.86 1.52 * SMB+nxf+chcsho+pm+CMA 0.55 -1.96 1.55 SMB+nxf+chcsho+pm+HML 2.74 -1.

item.title: Portfolio 202 Full Sample
item.description: Portfolio 202 Full Sample Cross Sectional Regression has intercept: 1 Bootstrap Iterations: 1000 Estimating Beta With: 1976-07-30 to 2017-12-29 Estimating Average Excess Return with: 1976-07-30-2017-12-29 Return Dimension TxN: (498, 202) Model Tn Left CV Right CV Is Nonlinear? MktRf 4.38 -1.49 1.35 * HML -0.12 -1.41 1.16 SMB 4.65 -1.52 1.6 * nxf 9.29 -1.

item.title: Portfolio 202 Individual Factor
item.description: Portfolio 202 Individual Factor Cross Sectional Regression has intercept: 1 Bootstrap Iterations: 1000 Estimating Beta With: 1976-07-30 to 2017-12-29 Estimating Average Excess Return with: 1976-07-30-2017-12-29 Return Dimension TxN: (498, 202) Model Tn Left CV Right CV Is Nonlinear? BAB 0.23 -1.45 1.37 CMA -0.32 -1.46 1.06 HML -0.12 -1.41 1.16 HML_Devil 8.86 -1.

item.title: Portfolio 202 Sub-sample
item.description: Portfolio 202 Sub-sample Cross Sectional Regression has intercept: 1 Bootstrap Iterations: 1000 Estimating Beta With: 1976-07-30 to 1999-12-31 Estimating Average Excess Return with: 2000-01-31-2017-12-29 Return Dimension TxN: (498, 202) Model Tn Left CV Right CV Is Nonlinear? MktRf 0.03 -1.41 1.05 HML 0.33 -1.35 0.79 SMB 8.07 -1.62 1.43 * nxf 12.31 -1.46 1.

item.title: Portfolio 5x5 Full Sample
item.description: Portfolio 5x5 Full Sample Cross Sectional Regression has intercept: 1 Bootstrap Iterations: 1000 Estimating Beta With: 1976-07-30 to 2017-12-29 Estimating Average Excess Return with: 1976-07-30-2017-12-29 Return Dimension TxN: (498, 2875) Model Tn Left CV Right CV Is Nonlinear? MktRf 91.58 -1.54 1.47 * HML 2.86 -1.5 1.29 * SMB 45.28 -1.54 1.46 * nxf 66.91 -1.

item.title: Portfolio 5x5 Sub-sample
item.description: Portfolio 5x5 Sub-sample Cross Sectional Regression has intercept: 1 Bootstrap Iterations: 1000 Estimating Beta With: 1976-07-30 to 1999-12-31 Estimating Average Excess Return with: 2000-01-31-2017-12-29 Return Dimension TxN: (498, 2875) Model Tn Left CV Right CV Is Nonlinear? MktRf 47.79 -1.5 1.55 * HML 13.51 -1.5 1.45 * SMB 127.72 -1.6 1.19 * nxf 125.05 -1.61 1.

item.title: Portfolio Holding Period adding one factor to Feng et al 4 Factors
item.description: Portfolio Holding Period adding one factor to Feng et al 4 Factors Cross Sectional Regression has intercept: 1 Bootstrap Iterations: 1000 Estimating Beta With: 1976-07-30 to 2017-12-29 Estimating Average Excess Return with: 1976-07-30-2017-12-29 Return Dimension TxN: (498, 202) Model Tn Left CV Right CV Is Nonlinear? SMB+nxf+chcsho+pm+BAB 5.3 -1.99 1.9 * SMB+nxf+chcsho+pm+CMA 4.83 -2.08 1.87 * SMB+nxf+chcsho+pm+HML 4.
